name: grain-food-analysis-broker
description: Broker service for privacy-preserving Grain food-photo analysis

scripts.test: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js && node --test test/*.test.mjs
scripts.cf:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply MEALMARK_DB --env staging --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply MEALMARK_DB --env production --remote
